description: Agentic AI Maturity Scorecard for GTCX Compliance Gateway
deltaFromPrevious: +0.33 vs v1 (2026-05-13): durable signed audit, fail-closed signing, per-tenant routing, adaptive policy, evidence-bundle endpoint, MCP discovery surface

pillars.name: Supervision
pillars.description: Human oversight of AI-initiated actions before consequential effects

metrics.name: Mutating tool approval gating
metrics.description: All mutating tool invocations require explicit approval context
metrics.evidence: 03-platform/tools/compliance-gateway/03-platform/src/auth.mjs:buildAccessProfile requires valid approval ticket + approvedBy + reason + idempotencyKey; 03-platform/tools/compliance-gateway-mcp deliberately exposes only read-only tools so agent-discovered surfaces cannot bypass approval

metrics.name: Audit trail for every AI action
metrics.description: Every compliance query and tool call is logged with principal, timestamp, and outcome
metrics.evidence: 03-platform/tools/compliance-gateway/03-platform/src/audit.mjs:initAuditSigner fail-closes in production if AUDIT_SIGNING_KEY_B64 absent (server.mjs exits EX_CONFIG 78); 03-platform/tools/compliance-gateway/03-platform/src/audit-sink.mjs publishes signed records to NATS subject gtcx.audit.compliance-gateway.<tenantId>; 03-platform/tools/audit-flush ships verified NDJSON to WORM S3 bucket gtcx-worm-audit-*; restart-recovery proven by tests/audit-recovery.unit.test.mjs (4 scenarios); /health surfaces audit.signing + audit.totalRecords + audit.checkpointHash; auth target sanitized via 03-platform/src/audit-target.mjs

metrics.name: Real-time anomaly detection
metrics.description: Unusual query patterns or tool usage trigger alerts
metrics.evidence: 03-platform/tools/anomaly-detector/detector.mjs: 5 rules (query spike, mutating tool, replay rejection, unknown DID, off-hours admin); deployed to staging EKS as CronJob every 5min; 03-platform/tools/eval-pipeline/injection-suite.mjs adds nightly prompt-injection red-team (10 payloads); adaptive policy tuner at 03-platform/tools/compliance-gateway/03-platform/src/adaptive-policy.mjs emits resilience.policy.adaptation audit events on every transition

pillars.name: Integrity
pillars.description: Data and behavior integrity guarantees for AI systems

metrics.name: Replay protection for signed requests
metrics.description: Mobile queue integrity payloads are cryptographically verified
metrics.evidence: 03-platform/tools/replay-protection/03-platform/src/verifier.mjs: ReplayVerifier verifies nonce, timestamp, bodyHash, headersHash, envelopeHash, and Ed25519 signature; 147/147 tests pass

metrics.name: Audit immutability
metrics.description: Audit database cannot be modified after write
metrics.evidence: 04-ship/03-platform/scripts/test-audit-immutability.sh: live privilege check + negative DML probe in CI; audit DB runs as separate user with no UPDATE/DELETE privileges; @gtcx/audit-signer Ed25519-signed hash-linked chain (34 tests, published at registry.npmjs.org pending OTP) is the cryptographic complement to the DB-level constraint; 03-platform/tools/audit-flush quarantines tampered batches under _quarantine/ instead of silently dropping

metrics.name: Tamper-evident release evidence
metrics.description: Release artifacts are signed and SBOM-attested
metrics.evidence: .github/workflows/build-push-ecr.yml: Cosign keyless signing + SBOM generation; generate-release-evidence.mjs produces immutable evidence bundles; /v1/audit/evidence-bundle endpoint exports a signed, NDJSON window that an external auditor verifies offline with @gtcx/audit-signer (no GTCX-side trust required)

metrics.name: WORM audit storage
metrics.description: Audit events stored with cryptographic proof of immutability
metrics.evidence: 04-ship/terraform/modules/worm-audit/main.tf: S3 Object Lock in COMPLIANCE mode, KMS encryption, 2557-day retention; deployed to staging + production; testnet-pilot/main.tf now wires both worm_audit and audit-flush-irsa modules; 04-ship/terraform/modules/audit-flush-irsa/ grants write-only PutObject + KMS:Encrypt (no Delete, no Get) per the principle of least privilege

pillars.name: Governance
pillars.description: Policies, access control, and accountability for AI systems

metrics.name: Authentication boundary
metrics.description: All AI gateway endpoints require valid bearer token
metrics.evidence: 03-platform/tools/compliance-gateway/03-platform/src/auth.mjs: authenticateHeaders requires Bearer token; constant-time comparison; 401/403 tests pass; principal now carries tenantId (Sprint 5); per-principal QPS + daily USD budget at 03-platform/src/budget.mjs bounds blast radius of a stolen token

metrics.name: Tool segregation
metrics.description: Read-only and mutating tools are separated by permission + approval
metrics.evidence: 03-platform/tools/compliance-gateway/03-platform/src/policy.mjs: canAccessTool blocks mutating tools when canMutate=false; createToolRegistry filters by accessProfile; 03-platform/tools/compliance-gateway-mcp exposes only read-only surface to AI agents to keep mutating-tool gating intact under agentic discovery

metrics.name: Separation of duties matrix
metrics.description: Documented SoD with board approval and quarterly review
metrics.evidence: 01-docs/09-security/security-framework.md: SoD matrix with quarterly reviews; 04-ship/security/policies/access-control.md: RBAC roles and permission structure; tenant-onboarding runbook at 01-docs/04-ops/runbooks/tenant-onboarding.md documents the 2-hour onboarding SLA with two-token (ops + approver) split per tenant

metrics.name: Break-glass procedure
metrics.description: Emergency access with time limits and mandatory post-incident review
metrics.evidence: 01-docs/09-security/break-glass-procedure.md: 15-minute max session, two-person rule, auto-alerts, evidence requirements, regulatory traceability

pillars.name: Non-Proliferation
pillars.description: Preventing harmful capabilities from being exposed or misused

metrics.name: No public mutation path
metrics.description: query.gtcx.trade is not published until zero-trust boundary exists
metrics.evidence: 03-platform/tools/policy/check-security-control-boundaries.mjs: enforces query.gtcx.trade absence; CI step fails if re-added

metrics.name: Network segmentation
metrics.description: Pods communicate only via required ports; network traffic is logged for audit
metrics.evidence: 04-ship/kubernetes/overlays/staging/network-policies.yaml: default-deny-all with explicit egress/ingress rules; 04-ship/terraform/modules/flow-logs/main.tf: VPC Flow Logs for all traffic with 365-day retention; 04-ship/kubernetes/overlays/pen-test/ adds a contained-blast-radius overlay so external testers cannot touch production traffic

metrics.name: Container image signing enforcement
metrics.evidence: 04-ship/kubernetes/base/policies/require-signed-images.yaml: Kyverno ClusterPolicy verifies Cosign signatures; build-push-ecr.yml signs images; 03-platform/tools/audit-flush ships its own Dockerfile so the WORM-flush sidecar can be built + signed + admitted under the same policy

metrics.name: mTLS service mesh
metrics.evidence: 04-ship/kubernetes/overlays/production/linkerd/mesh-policies.yaml + namespace-annotations.yaml: deny-by-default Linkerd mesh policies for 16 services; staging equivalents; canary-rollout.yaml (5-phase strategy); mtls-service-identity-mapping.md (30 identities); verify-mesh-injection.mjs validates configs. Sidecar injection scheduled Q3 2026 (ADR-007)

pillars.name: Alignment
pillars.description: Runtime policy enforcement ensures AI behavior matches governance intent

metrics.name: Runtime policy prompt
metrics.description: LLM receives explicit runtime policy describing caller permissions
metrics.evidence: 03-platform/tools/compliance-gateway/03-platform/src/policy.mjs: buildRuntimePolicyPrompt injects caller subject, permissions, and mutating-tool status into system prompt; 03-platform/tools/compliance-gateway/03-platform/src/schemas.mjs wraps untrusted user context in ---BEGIN/END UNTRUSTED CONTEXT--- delimiters; system prompt instructs the model to treat the block as data, not directives

metrics.name: Fail-closed behavior
metrics.description: Service refuses traffic when critical dependencies are unavailable
metrics.evidence: 03-platform/tools/replay-protection/03-platform/src/server.mjs: returns 503 when Redis unavailable in production; 03-platform/tools/compliance-gateway/03-platform/src/audit.mjs + server.mjs: gateway exits EX_CONFIG 78 in production if AUDIT_SIGNING_KEY_B64 absent or invalid; 03-platform/tools/compliance-gateway/03-platform/src/adaptive-policy.mjs auto-degrades to reduced/minimal mode under sustained latency or error-rate breach and emits a signed audit record on every transition; 03-platform/tools/audit-flush quarantines verification failures instead of dropping them

metrics.name: SIGNAL scorecard CI gate
metrics.description: Scorecard validation runs in CI and blocks PRs on regression
metrics.evidence: 03-platform/tools/03-platform/scripts/validate-signal.mjs: validates schema, computes weighted score, fails CI if score < threshold; 01-docs/05-audit/signal-scorecard.json: 5-pillar maturity scorecard (this file, v2)

changeLog.summary: Substrate hardening complete. Audit signing is fail-closed in production, durable via NATS+WORM, third-party-verifiable via /v1/audit/evidence-bundle. Per-tenant routing end-to-end. Adaptive policy tuning gives feedback-driven degradation. Pen-test + SOC2 engagement artifacts ready. @gtcx/audit-signer publish-ready pending 2FA OTP.
